global.title: five models form a hierarchy from facet through template to offering to subscription to instance
global.content:
# five models form a hierarchy from facet through template to offering to subscription to instance

The five document models in this project form a directed graph:

```
Facet ──referenced-by──→ ResourceTemplate ──referenced-by──→ ServiceOffering
                                                                    │
                                                          (mapOfferingToSubscription)
                                                                    ↓
                                                         SubscriptionInstance
                                                                    │
                                                           resource.id PHID
                                                                    ↓
                                                          ResourceInstance
```

## Cross-Model PHID References

| From | Field | To | Relationship |
|------|-------|----|-------------|
| ServiceOffering | `resourceTemplateId` | ResourceTemplate | "built from this template" |
| ServiceOffering | `operatorId` | BuilderProfile (external) | "offered by" |
| ServiceOffering | `facetBindings.facetType` | Facet | "uses this classification" |
| SubscriptionInstance | `serviceOfferingId` | ServiceOffering | "subscribed to" |
| SubscriptionInstance | `operatorId` | BuilderProfile (external) | "operated by" |
| SubscriptionInstance | `customerId` | External | "purchased by" |
| SubscriptionInstance | `resource.id` | ResourceInstance | "has this resource" |
| ResourceInstance | `resourceTemplateId` | ResourceTemplate | "based on template" |
| ResourceInstance | `customerId` | External | "owned by" |
| ResourceTemplate | `operatorId` | BuilderProfile (external) | "created by" |
| ResourceTemplate | `facetBindings.facetType` | Facet | "uses this classification" |

## Data Flow Direction

1. **Facet** defines classification options
2. **ResourceTemplate** references Facets and defines base service catalog
3. **ServiceOffering** references a template and adds pricing (tiers, discounts, billing cycles)
4. **SubscriptionInstance** is initialized from an offering's final configuration via mapOfferingToSubscription
5. **ResourceInstance** is provisioned per subscription and tracks lifecycle

## Broader Ecosystem Context

These 5 local models are part of a 21-model ecosystem (see [[ecosystem map]]). Key cross-zone dependencies:

- `operatorId` fields reference [[builder-profile model describes individual contributor identities]] (Organization & Identity zone)
- SubscriptionInstance feeds into [[billing-statement model captures periodic billing summaries]] and [[invoice model generates formal payment requests]] (Finance & Reporting zones)
- [[service-subscription model tracks service-level subscription agreements]] sits between ServiceOffering and SubscriptionInstance as the agreement layer

---

Topics:
- [[object relations]]
- [[architecture decisions]]
- [[ecosystem map]]
global.description: Facet → ResourceTemplate → ServiceOffering → SubscriptionInstance → ResourceInstance forms the primary data flow; PHID references link across model boundaries
